title: Exposure: Polaroid
description: Addon for Exposure that adds Instant Camera
body:
### Addon for [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) that adds Instant Camera


Description in text form **Instant Camera** operates largely in the same way as a regular Camera, but exposes **Instant Slides** instead of a Film roll. - As with Film rolls, there are color slides as well as black and white. - To load the slides, right click the camera item with them in inventory. - Camera can hold up to **12** slides. - When exposed, you'll get your Photograph in 2 seconds. No developing needed. - Single slide produces one Photograph. Since **Instant Camera** is focused on convenience - you'll trade some functionality of a full fledged camera to be able print photos on the spot: - You cannot use attachments with Instant Camera, other than built-in Flash. - Zooming is limited. - Shutter speed control is limited. - Resolution of the resulting images are a bit lower (configurable)

Wiki


[](https://discord.gg/FzHKGDW2et)

#### Enjoying the mod? Your support would allow me to continue working on it and on other mods! [](https://patreon.com/mortuusars?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink) [](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=4VPMCBCLZVUEA)
